overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a robed character ascending a stone spiral staircase past a large serpent statue, transitioning into a vaulted Gothic chamber with warm torch lighting. The environment features detailed stone architecture and atmospheric indoor lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral stone staircase with serpent statue

events.description: character continues ascending the spiral staircase, passing the serpent statue on the left side

agents.ego_description: character in dark robes walking up the spiral stone staircase toward the arched doorway at the top

entered.detail: large coiled stone serpent dragon statue at the base of the staircase
worn stone steps spiraling upward between rough stone walls
rough hewn stone wall with mounted torch sconces
lit wall-mounted torch providing warm orange light
stone archway at the top of the stairs leading to a lit chamber

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow spiral stone staircase illuminated by wall sconces. A massive serpent statue looms at the base, gradually falling behind as the character climbs toward the arched doorway at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: vaulted circular chamber with stone benches and central basin

events.description: character passes through the arched doorway from the narrow staircase into the open vaulted chamber

agents.ego_description: character enters the vaulted chamber and walks toward the central stone basin at the far end

entered.detail: high ribbed stone vault ceiling with hanging lanterns
rectangular stone basin or sarcophagus in the center of the chamber
heavy wooden door with metal studs set in the stone wall
large green fern in a stone planter pot
stone bench built against the curved wall

segments.scene_description: Passing through the archway, the scene opens into a circular vaulted chamber with a high ribbed ceiling. The character walks across the stone floor toward a central basin, passing potted ferns and stone benches, with a heavy wooden door visible on the left wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a narrow, enclosed stone staircase into a vast, vaulted Gothic chamber. It begins with the character climbing a spiral stair illuminated by wall sconces, leaving a massive serpent statue behind as they move toward an arched doorway at the top. As the character passes through the archway, the confined space opens into a wide circular room featuring a high ribbed ceiling and warm torch lighting. The camera then follows the character across the stone floor, passing potted ferns and stone benches before approaching a central basin with a heavy wooden door visible on the left wall.
